metadata.description: Baxter team marketplace for shared MCP servers, skills, rules, and agents.

plugins.name: baxter-polarion
plugins.description: Standalone Polarion MCP server for Linux and Windows with bundled binaries.

plugins.name: baxter-flc-platform-sw
